name: dual-pharmchain-custody-demo
description: DUAL PharmChain custody ledger demo for serialized drug-family handoffs.

scripts.check: node --check server.mjs && node --check client.js && node --check src/pharmchain.mjs && node --check src/deployment.mjs && node --check api/mcp.js && node --check api/dual/status.js && node --check api/batches/current.js && node --check api/batches/evaluate.js && node --check api/proof.js && node --check api/template.js && node --check api/deployment.js && node --check scripts/smoke-test.mjs && node --check scripts/proof-rederive.mjs && node --check scripts/unit-proof.mjs && node --check scripts/mcp-unit.mjs && node --check scripts/network-proof.mjs
scripts.qa: npm run check && npm run proof:unit && npm run proof:mcp && npm run smoke && npm run proof:rederive
